__doc: Quality checklist for pipeline step 2 (Claude build from transforms). Every block must pass before merge.

checks.label: DRY
checks.rule: No duplicated markup, classes, or type definitions across files. Shared constants exported from one place.
fail: inline union types that exist in constants
column/card classes duplicated between view and section

checks.label: Single Source of Truth
checks.rule: Types from @/types, data from @/lib/data, constants from @/lib/constants, tokens from DS classes. Never redefine.
fail: local BadgeColor type when constants has one

checks.label: Separation of Concerns
checks.rule: Block=display (props only). View=layout (no state). Section=state+events+data. Never mix layers.

checks.label: Dumb Blocks
checks.rule: No hooks, no store, no data imports, no side effects. Props in, JSX out.
fail: any React hook in a block file

checks.label: DS Compliance
checks.rule: All text styles via DS classes (txt-compact-*). All colors via DS tokens (bg-ui-*, text-ui-*). Shadows via DS (shadow-elevation-*). No raw hex, no arbitrary Tailwind where DS class exists.

checks.label: Type Safety
checks.rule: All props typed with exported interfaces. Use generics for reusable components. Use Pick/Omit for partial types. Import shared types, don't redeclare.

checks.label: No Figma Noise
checks.rule: Strip classes that serve no purpose: relative (no absolute children), shrink-0 (in flex-col parent with no overflow risk), min-w-full (on block element).
fail: relative on element with no absolute children

checks.label: Responsive
checks.rule: Flex layouts must not break on small screens. Use min-w + overflow-x-auto for horizontal layouts. Use flex-1 for equal distribution.

checks.label: Accessibility
checks.rule: Interactive elements need role, tabIndex, aria-label. Clickable divs need role='button' tabIndex={0} onKeyDown. Color not sole indicator.
fail: no keyboard handler on clickable element

checks.label: Data Driven
checks.rule: Zero hardcoded content strings in blocks. All text (labels, titles, placeholders, button text) comes from props. Props come from data.yaml via lib/data.ts at the section/gallery level. Blocks never import data — they receive it.
fail: hardcoded user-visible string in block (e.g. 'Save changes', 'Click to change photo')
block renders content not passed as prop
section/gallery has inline strings that exist in data.yaml

checks.label: Transform Fidelity
checks.rule: Structure derived FROM transform output. Classes preserved unless noise. Repeated siblings → .map(). Hardcoded text → props. Never rebuild from memory. NEVER override component variant/size/props from transform — transform reads Figma directly and is more accurate than visual guessing.
fail: changed variant/size that transform extracted from Figma

checks.label: Verify Render
checks.rule: After every edit: open in browser, visually confirm the change rendered. A 200 status code is not verification. Import without render change = broken. Screenshot or visual check required before moving on.
fail: added import but didn't update render code

scoring.warn: a11y or responsive yellow — fix before merge
scoring.fail: Any of separation, dumb-blocks, transform-fidelity red — block merge
